name: Hippo Memory
description: Knowledge graph memory via Hippo -- remember, recall, and ask questions against a persistent knowledge graph

autoCapture.description: Automatically store conversation turns in hippo

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant context before agent runs

maxRecallFacts.description: Max facts to inject in auto-recall

tools.name: hippo_remember
tools.description: Store a fact or statement in the knowledge graph

tools.name: hippo_recall
tools.description: Search the knowledge graph for relevant facts

tools.name: hippo_ask
tools.description: Ask a question answered by the knowledge graph
